theses.title: USD softness into Q3 as cutting cycle priced in
theses.thesis: DXY will drift lower as the Fed begins easing in July. Lower real yields and a narrowing rate differential vs. EUR weigh on the dollar. Carry into EM FX becomes attractive again.
drivers: Fed cuts begin July; 75bps priced by year-end
theses.invalidation: DXY closes above 107 for 5 consecutive sessions OR US core CPI re-accelerates above 3.5% YoY.

theses.title: EM equities rally on global liquidity tailwind
theses.thesis: EM equities will outperform as global liquidity inflects. The setup looks like 2016 — a weaker dollar and dovish G3 unlock flows into EM. This is almost certain to play out.

theses.title: USD strength on safe-haven bid through summer
theses.thesis: Geopolitical risk premium drives DXY higher as US assets attract haven flows. Correlation between VIX and DXY has been positive YTD.
